response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience, with recent work directly aligned to the role: TypeScript/Node.js product work, React, MongoDB, AWS, and current involvement in AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators. Demonstrates strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), architecture exposure, and a track record of shipping end-to-end features. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin/Java depth in recent roles, and Vitest specifically, but the foundational fit is strong and the adjacent skills suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Direct, recent experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS on a production platform handling millions of transactions
Active hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching a stated required skill
Strong software-craftsmanship signals: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored test tooling and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; testing stack history leans toward Jest-era and D-language tooling
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (robotic arms at Altom, pre-2018) — limited evidence of recent JVM backend work
Significant portion of career invested in D-language ecosystem, which may indicate niche preferences not aligned with primary stack

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work
Missing Nest.js and limited recent Kotlin/Java
